query:
INSERT INTO product_variants (
  productId, 
  variantCode, 
  variantName, 
  productionStatus, 
  variantType, 
  customerId, 
  createdBy, 
  createdAt, 
  updatedAt
)
SELECT 
  productId,
  batchCode as variantCode,
  customRequirements as variantName,
  productionStatus,
  'exclusive' as variantType,
  customerId,
  1 as createdBy,
  createdAt,
  updatedAt
FROM product_batches
LIMIT 20;
